title: EB infra substrate hygiene — close access-graph gaps + VPC peering capture
description: Closes access-graph gap classes surfaced by Cat 3 coverage suite at 2026-06-03 substrate read. v1.0.0 misread 'catalogNotCovered' as 'absent from catalog' — substrate read showed those buckets present in catalog but lacking accessGrants. v1.1.0 amends to add accessGrants for all substrate-verified externally-accessible catalog resources: cis-services-1 (server entry + FK + grant chain), ectropy-terraform-state (boto3 with fleet-wide prod key), server-do-primary (doctl), db-ectropy-staging (doctl). Defers resources lacking verified access values to follow-ups. Also adds rotation/livenessProbe to credentialStore items and captures live VPC peering 768a1eb6.

outputs.description: Add server-cis-services-1 entry to env-cis.servers[]. Server shape: id=server-cis-services-1, name=cis-services-1, provider=digitalocean, region=sfo3, ip=143.110.238.160 (doctl-verified 2026-05-23), services=[]. sshConfig deliberately omitted — host is zero-ssh per resource-access.json hostPosture. specs omitted — not in current substrate. Resolves the FK target for resource-access.json accessGrant + hostPosture.
acceptanceCriteria: infrastructure-catalog.json env-cis.servers[] contains exactly one entry with id=server-cis-services-1
server entry ip=143.110.238.160 verbatim
server entry provider=digitalocean, region=sfo3
ajv-cli validates infrastructure-catalog.json against canonical schema v1.2.0 with exit 0

outputs.description: Update resource-access.json FK refs to canonical catalog id. Changes: ag-cis-services-1.resourceRef from 'cis-services-1' to 'server-cis-services-1'; hostPosture[0].serverRef from 'cis-services-1' to 'server-cis-services-1'. Matches infrastructure-catalog.schema.json server.id pattern ^server-[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$. Closes dangling-resourceRefs finding.
acceptanceCriteria: resource-access.json accessGrants[] entry with id=ag-cis-services-1 has resourceRef=server-cis-services-1
resource-access.json hostPosture[] entry has serverRef=server-cis-services-1
eb-agent dangling-resourceRefs returns 0
eb-agent coverage-infrastructure returns 0 grantNotInCatalog and 0 postureNotInCatalog

outputs.description: Add accessGrant for ectropy-terraform-state bucket. Bucket already exists in env-prod.objectStorage[] (purpose=terraform-state). Grant shape: id=ag-bucket-5, resourceRef=ectropy-terraform-state, resourceType=object-store, accessMethodRef=am-boto3, credentialRef=f89b9344-3542-43ae-acbf-b3e7002d1904 (TF_DO_SPACES_PROD — per 2026-06-02 STEP 1-PRE-D fleet-wide bucket access matrix verbatim from resource-access.json auditTrail entry: production key reaches all seven ectropy-fleet buckets including terraform-state). Resolves FU-EB-CATALOG-TF-STATE-BUCKET-MISSING-1.
acceptanceCriteria: resource-access.json accessGrants[] contains entry id=ag-bucket-5 with resourceRef=ectropy-terraform-state, resourceType=object-store, accessMethodRef=am-boto3, credentialRef=f89b9344-3542-43ae-acbf-b3e7002d1904
eb-agent coverage-infrastructure: ectropy-terraform-state no longer in catalogNotCovered

outputs.description: Add accessGrant for server-do-primary (env-prod primary droplet, DigitalOcean sfo3, ectropy-production). Grant shape: id=ag-server-do-primary, resourceRef=server-do-primary, resourceType=server, accessMethodRef=am-doctl, credentialRef=null (doctl uses DO_TOKEN, not a credentialItem in BW vault), hostPostureRef=null (no hostPosture entry for server-do-primary in substrate — separate FU to add if SSH/break-glass posture needs modeling).
acceptanceCriteria: resource-access.json accessGrants[] contains entry id=ag-server-do-primary with resourceRef=server-do-primary, resourceType=server, accessMethodRef=am-doctl
credentialRef and hostPostureRef both null per substrate
eb-agent coverage-infrastructure: server-do-primary no longer in catalogNotCovered

outputs.description: Add rotation and livenessProbe blocks to both credentialStore items (TF_DO_SPACES_STAGING itemId 2cffb9fb-9123-4bb0-b244-b3e7000fe2af, TF_DO_SPACES_PROD itemId f89b9344-3542-43ae-acbf-b3e7002d1904). Rotation policy=on-exposure for both, lastRotated=null, trackedByFollowUp=null. livenessProbe for 2cffb9fb=not-tested with nulls (no probe evidence in substrate). livenessProbe for f89b9344=success with lastVerifiedReachable=2026-06-02T20:17:39Z and verifiedBy=d-2026-06-02-prod-spaces-credentials-graph (real probe data from STEP 1-PRE-D bucket access matrix that produced the 2026-06-02 OUT-1 commit, per resource-access.json auditTrail entry).
acceptanceCriteria: credentialStore.items[] entry for 2cffb9fb has rotation.policy=on-exposure, rotation.lastRotated=null, rotation.trackedByFollowUp=null
credentialStore.items[] entry for f89b9344 has rotation.policy=on-exposure, rotation.lastRotated=null, rotation.trackedByFollowUp=null
credentialStore.items[] entry for 2cffb9fb has livenessProbe.lastVerifiedResult=not-tested, livenessProbe.lastVerifiedReachable=null, livenessProbe.verifiedBy=null

credentialStore.items[] entry for f89b9344 has livenessProbe.lastVerifiedResult=success, livenessProbe.lastVerifiedReachable=2026-06-02T20:17:39Z, livenessProbe.verifiedBy=d-2026-06-02-prod-spaces-credentials-graph
eb-agent drift-rotation returns 0 noPolicy
eb-agent drift-liveness returns 0 drifted (success and not-tested are non-drift states)

outputs.description: Add accessGrant for db-ectropy-staging (DigitalOcean Managed PostgreSQL, sfo3). Grant shape: id=ag-db-ectropy-staging, resourceRef=db-ectropy-staging, resourceType=database, accessMethodRef=am-doctl, credentialRef=null (doctl ops on managed DB use DO_TOKEN; data-plane connection uses DATABASE_URL connectionStringRef which is not in credentialStore scope), hostPostureRef=null. Covers DO API operations on the managed cluster (firewall, backup, restore, scale). Data-plane access via DATABASE_URL is application-internal and not modeled in the access graph.
acceptanceCriteria: resource-access.json accessGrants[] contains entry id=ag-db-ectropy-staging with resourceRef=db-ectropy-staging, resourceType=database, accessMethodRef=am-doctl
credentialRef and hostPostureRef both null per substrate
eb-agent coverage-infrastructure: db-ectropy-staging no longer in catalogNotCovered

outputs.description: Capture live VPC peering 768a1eb6 in catalog.vpcPeerings[]. Field landed in schema v1.2.0 today (SR PR #106, main 98534ab) specifically to enable drift-vpcpeering. Entry shape: id=vpc-peering-768a1eb6, doId=768a1eb6, envA=env-staging, envB=env-prod, region=sfo3, status=pending-elimination, notes=staging<->production VPC peering, flagged for elimination per multi-session memory. First real vpcPeerings[] instance data — transitions schema from 'extension only' to 'extension + first real data'.
acceptanceCriteria: infrastructure-catalog.json catalog.vpcPeerings[] contains one entry with id=vpc-peering-768a1eb6, doId=768a1eb6, status=pending-elimination
envA and envB FK into existing environments[] (env-staging, env-prod both present)
eb-agent drift-vpcpeering returns 1 pendingElimination entry (vpc-peering-768a1eb6)

preMerge: eb-agent coverage-infrastructure: catalogNotCovered drops by 4 (ectropy-terraform-state, server-do-primary, db-ectropy-staging, AND cis-services-1 once OUT-1 lands the server entry); grantNotInCatalog=0; postureNotInCatalog=0
git diff --stat scoped to exactly .roadmap/infrastructure-catalog.json and .roadmap/resource-access.json — no other file touched
PR CI green; --admin merge forbidden per memory #15
postMerge: eb-agent coverage-infrastructure on main reflects the closure (catalogNotCovered: ectropy-development-configs + server-edge-karbon521 + 3 self-hosted DBs + 6 internal services remain by design with FUs)
Cat 3b tools (drift-liveness, drift-vpcpeering) return real-data results on main

transitions.trigger: spec v1.0.0 authored against canonical deliverable.schema.json v1.1.0

amended to v1.1.0 after sandbox-test surfaced OUT-3/OUT-4 substrate misread — buckets already in catalog, gap is missing accessGrants. Amendment tightens scope to substrate-verified externally-accessible resources, defers unverified to follow-ups
SR instance v1.1.0 amendment landed at schema-registry main ee5dbf5 (PR #116) — anchored spec available for EB execution against chore/eb-infra-hygiene-2026-06-03 branch

EB PR #292 merged at fd618f3 covering all 7 outputs (server-cis-services-1 catalog entry, FK refs rename, 3 accessGrants for ectropy-terraform-state + server-do-primary + db-ectropy-staging, rotation+livenessProbe on 2 TF_DO_SPACES items, vpc-peering-768a1eb6 capture). First real substrate population against today's schemas: infrastructure-catalog v1.2.0 (vpcPeerings, SR PR #106) and resource-access v1.1.0 (livenessProbe, SR PR #108).

Post-merge substrate verified clean per EB canvas F0B85QR0UDQ: coverage-infrastructure (grantNotInCatalog=[], postureNotInCatalog=[]), dangling-resourceRefs=0, drift-vpcpeering=1 pending-elimination (vpc-peering-stg-prod-768a1eb6 correctly surfaced). drift-rotation flagged 2 noPolicy entries — L4 approved override per memory #15, new FU FU-EB-RA-ROTATION-POLICY-COMPLETION-1 filed in succession. TRUTH-DELIVERED instance authored at schemas/_instances/truth-delivered/d-2026-06-03-eb-infra-hygiene.json this PR. closureStatus=closed-with-debt.

notes: v1.1.0 amendment scope: 7 outputs covering all substrate-verified externally-accessible catalog resources. OUT-3/OUT-4 from v1.0.0 (catalog bucket additions) deleted — sandbox-test confirmed both buckets already in catalog; gap was missing accessGrants. v1.1.0 OUT-3 grants ectropy-terraform-state with f89b9344 (prod key, fleet-wide reach per 2026-06-02 STEP 1-PRE-D substrate). v1.1.0 OUT-4 grants server-do-primary via doctl. v1.1.0 OUT-6 grants db-ectropy-staging via doctl. Deferred to follow-ups for substrate-decision work: (a) ectropy-development-configs — no probe evidence which key reaches it; (b) server-edge-karbon521 — no current accessMethod covers Karbon edge access (Starlink + Peplink, air-gapped per DEC-004); (c) self-hosted DBs (db-speckle, db-redis-cache, db-qdrant) and app-internal services — internal compose-network only, not external ops surfaces, separate modeling design needed. FU closure for the two pre-existing FUs ships via succession micro-PR after merge to preserve memory #18 branch scope-lock. Spec instance currently anchored at SR main 1f8a81d (PR #114) at v1.0.0; v1.1.0 amendment requires SR re-land via succession micro-PR per F0B85LNSTC4 doctrine. Spelling Luhtala verified per memory #22.
